title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #13 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: It has been a long time ...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Since I began drifting on this sea...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: to be continued in the next chapter.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: A man snatched away my shadow...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: But it could. A shadow being stolen...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: My Nakama were all Annihi- Lated!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm "dead-bones" brook! Nice to meet you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I was able to find some- body!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: How many years I've been wan- dering!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: For me, you're my delight!! Yohoho!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You invited me to be your Nakama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm really glad. Thank you very much.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: But the truth is, I should decline.

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.
